description_long: This object is a single, elongated hot dog sausage with a slightly irregular, cylindrical shape and a browned, textured surface. The exterior appears to be cooked, with a mix of golden brown and darker brown spots, suggesting it has been grilled or roasted. There is no visible bun, condiments, or packaging, and the sausage is fully exposed on all sides. The ends of the sausage are slightly tapered and uneven, with one end appearing more rounded and the other more jagged. The surface has a matte, semi-rough finish, and the coloration is consistent with a typical pork or beef sausage. The object is relatively small, likely intended to be handheld, and would be found in urban food settings such as street vendors or food carts.
description: A browned, grilled sausage with a textured, matte surface and no bun or condiments, fully exposed and slightly irregular in shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sausage, with a browned, spotty surface and both ends visible.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the rounded tip and the cylindrical body, highlighting the uneven surface texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the sausage's length and surface details visible.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, showing a more jagged tip and the sausage's cylindrical form.
